sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ طَوِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je sjela u park nakon dugog dana.
sentences.translationEn: The family sat in the park after a long day.

sentences.translation: Djeca su jela voće i pila sok.
sentences.translationEn: The children ate fruit and drank juice.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ الْأَبُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ وَقَالَ: مَا أَجْمَلَ هَذَا الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Otac je pogledao nebo i rekao: Kako je ovaj dan lijep.
sentences.translationEn: The father looked at the sky and said: What a beautiful day.

sentences.arabic: رَجَعُوا إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ وَنَامُوا بَعْدَ عَشَاءٍ خَفِيفٍ.
sentences.translation: Vratili su se u hotel i spavali nakon lakog večernjeg obroka.
sentences.translationEn: They returned to the hotel and slept after a light dinner.
